creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks Yuri. A new release of Scotch, 7.0, is also available.
But the problem is that ATM the port cad/scotch is bundled to french/aster.

I guess that a good solution might be to rename this port as cad/scotch-aster, and to create a new math/scotch port. Obviously, these two ports would conflict, but if that causes a problem, we could try to install cad/scotch-aster in a non-standard directory.
